title: Queue poping wrong value when otherwise unused

features.name: queue pop_back returns wrong value with single element
features.description: Code should include a queue with push_front and pop_back operations where pop_back is called when the queue has exactly one element

features.name: queue push_front and pop_back cycle
features.description: Code should include sequential push_front followed by pop_back on a queue with only one element, where pop_back value is checked against expected
